title: Secure Protocols, State Machines, Replay, and Downgrade · Language Lens: Crypto Go Protocol Goals Roles

Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Protocol Goals Roles · Theory Crypto Go Protocol Goals Roles
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 9648 during a replicated device restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to advance a role-bound protocol state with session identity, ordered replay defense, transcript binding, and downgrade rejection; record key custody, terminal failure, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk ownership; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define initiator, responder, identities, trust assumptions, authentication goals, secrecy goals, compromise model, and terminal states.
